Operator filtered Orders by 'In Production' showing 7 rows (Showing 1-7 of 7). Kanban 'In Production' column count also shows '7'. Counts match.

Admin navigated Dashboard->Orders->New Order (completed wizard)->Order Detail->Workflows->Settings->Dashboard. No re-login required at any point, 'Admin' context persisted in header throughout.

Filled Step 2 (production line, shift, notes), clicked Next. Step 3 (Review & Submit) loaded with checkmarks on Steps 1 and 2.

Review summary on Step 3 showed all entered data: Product=Steel Bracket A, Quantity=100, Priority=High, Due Date=4/15/2026, Production Line=Assembly Line Alpha, Shift=Afternoon, Notes=S1G4 test notes for stability.
